user.title: Connect to Skylink Orbit Home
user.description: Enter your Orbit Home app credentials and hub IDs. Hub IDs can be found by capturing the app traffic with mitmproxy (look for hub_id values in hub_add requests).

data_description.hub_ids: Enter your hub IDs separated by commas. Example: rA8qM4QS, YAkDn9r2
data_description.acc_no: Found in hub_add responses. Leave blank to auto-detect.
data_description.base_url: Only change if the Skylink API server changes.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Orbit Home
reauth_confirm.description: Your session for {username} has expired. Please enter your password to reconnect.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your Orbit Home credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to iot.skyhm.net. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.no_hub_ids: Please enter at least one hub ID.

abort.already_configured: This Orbit Home account is already configured.

init.title: Skylink Orbit Options
init.description: Edit the hub IDs for your garage doors. Add or remove hub IDs separated by commas.

data_description.hub_ids: Enter your hub IDs separated by commas. Example: rA8qM4QS, YAkDn9r2, NewHubId

error.no_hub_ids: Please enter at least one hub ID.
